Explanation:
The "team" column across all rows includes the following entries: Champ Motorsports (rows 1–2), Asia Racing Team (rows 3 and 7), Krenek Motorsport (row 4), China Sonangol (row 5), Sonangol Motopark (row 6), Angola Racing Team (rows 8–11), and Carlin (row 12). Counting unique team names gives 7 distinct teams: Champ Motorsports, Asia Racing Team, Krenek Motorsport, China Sonangol, Sonangol Motopark, Angola Racing Team, and Carlin. Therefore, the prediction of 7 is correct.
